policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-adb-w22 - Restrict the use of not supported use cases'. The suffix '-adbmanaged-rg' is required. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+Databricks#IncidentremediationDatabricks-drcp-adb-w22 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP Azure Databricks managed resource group name must have the postfix '-adbmanaged-rg'
policyDefinition.description: This policy enforces Azure Databricks managed resource group name to have the postfix '-adbmanaged-rg'.

drcp.name: DatabricksManagedResourceGroupName
drcp.controlDesc: Restrict the use of not supported use cases

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - Audit, Deny or Disabled.
